calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-049 BG gating wider-seed sweep under StepHarness, Tier-1 diagnostic re-run after 514h manifest lost to mid-completion SIGTERM (supersedes V3-EXQ-514h)
items.note: Re-run of V3-EXQ-514h after the 514h manifest was lost to mid-completion SIGTERM at 17:32:00.5 on ree-cloud-1 (auto-scaler bug, since fixed). 514h's runner_status entry shows PASS but no metrics file. 514i recovers the metrics.

items.title: MECH-320 (ARC-066 child) tonic_vigor_coupling_score_bias substrate-readiness diagnostic (6 sub-tests UC1-UC6)
items.note: MECH-320 substrate-readiness. UC1 instantiation, UC2 master-OFF backward-compat, UC3 EWMA arithmetic (steady-state convergence + half-life crossing + sign-convention), UC4 select_action wiring contract via act_with_split_obs (compute_score_bias pre-select + update_score_receipt post-select both fire), UC5 MECH-094 simulation gate, UC6 R3 form discriminability (additive vs multiplicative produce different bias on a held-out non-uniform-|score| batch). Smoke 6/6 PASS 2026-05-10. Behavioural validation (3-arm discriminative pair on a well-fed-safe-familiar substrate) is queued separately AFTER this PASSes. lit-pull verdicts: ARC-066 lit_conf 0.789 supports.
